hero.headline: Vignan Online MBA in Healthcare Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Healthcare Management specialisation from Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. NAAC A+, NIRF #70 University 2025, Deemed University. Rs 90,000 total fee across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month. Sem 3-4 covers SCM and Material Management in Healthcare, Medical Record Management, Planning of Healthcare Services, Healthcare Information Technology, Healthcare Insurance, Healthcare Laws, and Medical Tourism.

sections.tldr: Vignan Online MBA Healthcare Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #70 University 2025. Rs 90,000 total fee (4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through Vignan. Sem 3-4 covers Healthcare SCM, Medical Record Management, Healthcare Planning, Healthcare IT, Healthcare Insurance, Healthcare Laws, and Medical Tourism. The cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated healthcare management track in India.

about.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Healthcare Management is offered by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (VFSTR), a Deemed University established in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. VFSTR holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. NIRF ranks it #70 among universities in 2025.

The Healthcare Management specialisation covers SCM and Material Management in Healthcare, Medical Record Management, Planning of Healthcare Services, Healthcare Information Technology, Healthcare Insurance, Healthcare Laws, and Medical Tourism across Semesters 3 and 4. The syllabus addresses hospital operations, healthcare IT systems, insurance, and the legal framework for Indian healthcare.

At Rs 90,000 total, Vignan Online is among the cheapest UGC-DEB approved online MBAs with a healthcare management specialisation. The trade-off is limited brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India. For healthcare professionals, hospital administrators, and pharma sector workers who need the MBA credential at minimum cost, Vignan Healthcare Management is a practical option.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Environment and Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Study the external business environment, strategic analysis frameworks, and formulation of competitive strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Project Management
sem3Subjects.description: Cover project planning, scheduling, resource allocation, risk management, and project execution methodologies.

sem3Subjects.name: SCM and Material Management in Healthcare
sem3Subjects.description: Study procurement of medical supplies, inventory management for hospitals, vendor evaluation, and healthcare supply chain optimisation.

sem3Subjects.name: Medical Record Management
sem3Subjects.description: Cover health information systems, patient record digitisation, electronic health records (EHR), and medical data governance.

sem3Subjects.name: Planning of Healthcare Services
sem3Subjects.description: Study hospital capacity planning, healthcare service delivery models, public health infrastructure, and resource allocation for healthcare facilities.

sem3Subjects.name: Open Elective
sem3Subjects.description: Choose from cross-functional electives offered by Vignan Online. Subject options confirmed at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Healthcare Information Technology
sem4Subjects.description: Study hospital information systems, telemedicine platforms, health IT infrastructure, and technology adoption in healthcare delivery.

sem4Subjects.name: Healthcare Insurance
sem4Subjects.description: Cover health insurance models in India, claim processing, TPA operations, Ayushman Bharat, and corporate health insurance programme design.

sem4Subjects.name: Healthcare Laws
sem4Subjects.description: Study Indian healthcare legislation, Clinical Establishments Act, patient rights, medical negligence, and regulatory compliance for hospitals.

sem4Subjects.name: Medical Tourism
sem4Subjects.description: Cover India's medical tourism ecosystem, international patient facilitation, accreditation for medical tourism, and marketing healthcare services globally.

sem4Subjects.name: Cross-Functional Elective
sem4Subjects.description: Choose from electives spanning other MBA specialisations. Subject options confirmed at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Master Thesis/Project
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on a healthcare management topic with data collection, analysis, and recommendations.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Vignan Online MBA specialisations. See the main Vignan Online MBA page for the core subject list. Syllabus applies to the 2025-26 admission cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

whoHires.body:
Healthcare Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Hospitals and multi-specialty chains, Pharma companies, Health insurance (TPAs), Medical devices, Public health organisations, Diagnostic chains, Medical tourism agencies

**Entry-level roles:** Hospital Operations Executive, Healthcare Analyst, Medical Insurance Coordinator, Health IT Associate, Patient Relations Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Hospital Administrator, Healthcare Operations Manager, Insurance Manager, Medical Records Manager, Healthcare Project Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CEO (Hospital), Director of Operations (Healthcare Chain), VP Healthcare Services, Chief Medical Administrator, Head of Medical Tourism

**Typical hiring organisations:** Apollo Hospitals, Fortis Healthcare, Max Healthcare, Narayana Health, Manipal Hospitals, AIIMS (admin cadre), Star Health Insurance, ICICI Lombard Health, Medanta, Dr Reddy's, Cipla, SRL Diagnostics

skills.body:
The Healthcare Management specialisation builds skills tested by hospitals, health insurance, and pharma organisations:

**Technical skills:**
- Healthcare SCM: medical supply procurement, hospital inventory optimisation, vendor management, and cold chain logistics for pharmaceuticals
- Medical Record Management: EHR system administration, health data coding, patient record digitisation, and medical data privacy compliance
- Healthcare IT: hospital information system selection, telemedicine platform management, and health IT infrastructure planning
- Healthcare Insurance: TPA operations, claim adjudication, Ayushman Bharat compliance, and corporate health plan design

**Applied skills:**
- Healthcare Planning: hospital capacity modelling, outpatient department flow optimisation, and service delivery network design
- Healthcare Laws: Clinical Establishments Act compliance, medical negligence risk management, and patient consent documentation

**Soft skills:** Patient relations management, cross-departmental coordination in hospitals, regulatory audit preparation, and healthcare service quality communication.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Vignan Online MBA Healthcare Management against peers:

**vs NIU Online MBA Healthcare (Rs 97,600):** NIU is Rs 7,600 more. Both are sub-Rs 1 lakh options with dedicated healthcare tracks. Vignan adds NIRF #70 ranking and covers Medical Tourism as a dedicated subject.

**vs Sharda Online MBA Healthcare (Rs 1,54,500):** Sharda is 1.7x the cost with NAAC A+ and stronger Delhi NCR brand. For healthcare management roles at top hospital chains in North India, Sharda carries more weight. Vignan delivers similar accreditation at Rs 64,500 less.

**vs DPU Online MBA Healthcare (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is 2.1x the cost with NAAC A++ and NIRF #41. DPU's Pune healthcare ecosystem connections and higher accreditation grade make it a premium option. Vignan is the budget alternative at less than half the fee.

At Rs 90,000, Vignan is the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated healthcare management track in this batch. The limitation is brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India.

fees.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Healthcare Management is priced at Rs 90,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This makes Vignan Online among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary involved.

**Additional charges**: Registration, application, examination, and project fees are not separately documented on Vignan Online's portal. Please reconfirm all charges with our counsellor before enrolment.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Vignan Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and all applicable charges with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Healthcare Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Vignan Online MBA Healthcare Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Ramya
items.liked: Healthcare Insurance and Healthcare Laws subjects were immediately applicable to my hospital admin role. At Rs 90,000, this is the cheapest healthcare MBA I could find with NAAC A+.
items.disliked: Limited case studies from Apollo or Fortis-style large hospital chains. More real-world case integration would help.
items.body: I work in hospital administration at a multi-specialty hospital in Andhra Pradesh. The Healthcare SCM subject improved how I manage medical supply procurement. Healthcare Laws gave me compliance frameworks I now apply to accreditation audits. The Master Thesis project on patient flow optimisation became a working document for my hospital. At Rs 90,000, the return was immediate.

items.name: Naveen
items.liked: Medical Tourism subject was unique and relevant for Bangalore's growing medical tourism sector.
items.disliked: Vignan brand is not recognised by healthcare chains in Bangalore or Chennai. Hospital management roles at Apollo, Fortis, or Manipal Hospitals prefer MBAs from Symbiosis, Manipal, or Tata Institute. Vignan does not register.
items.body: The healthcare syllabus is solid for the price point. Seven dedicated healthcare subjects across Sem 3-4 is more than most budget programmes offer. But healthcare management hiring in metros prioritises brand. If you already work in a hospital and need the credential for internal advancement, Vignan is fine. For external hiring at top hospital chains, the brand limitation is real. Budget an additional certification like NABH or healthcare quality to compensate.

items.name: Swathi
items.liked: Healthcare IT subject covered telemedicine and HIS, which are directly relevant to my role in a diagnostic chain. Zero-cost EMI meant zero financial stress.
items.disliked: Career support for healthcare management roles is non-existent from the university side.
items.body: I manage IT systems at a diagnostic lab chain. The Healthcare IT and Medical Record Management subjects gave me frameworks for EHR implementation and health data governance. Planning of Healthcare Services helped me think about capacity planning across our branches. Good programme for healthcare professionals in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana who want an MBA without paying Rs 1.5-2 lakh.

faqs.question: Is Rs 90,000 the total Vignan Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rs 90,000 is the total programme fee spread across 4 semesters. Reconfirm any additional charges for registration, examination, or project with our counsellor before enrolment.

faqs.question: Does Vignan offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers zero-cost EMI directly at Rs 5,700 per month. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved.

faqs.question: What is Vignan's NAAC grade?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research holds NAAC A+ accreditation. Verify the current status at naac.gov.in.

faqs.question: Does the Healthcare Management specialisation cover hospital administration?
faqs.answer: Yes. SCM and Material Management in Healthcare, Planning of Healthcare Services, and Medical Record Management directly address hospital operations and administration. Healthcare Laws covers regulatory compliance for hospitals.

faqs.question: How does Vignan Healthcare compare to DPU Healthcare on fees?
faqs.answer: Vignan Healthcare costs Rs 90,000 total. DPU Healthcare costs approximately Rs 1,89,400. DPU is 2.1x the price but offers NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #41 ranking, and stronger Pune healthcare industry connections.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in Healthcare Management at Rs 90,000 total fee.
You work in hospital administration, health insurance, or pharma and need the MBA credential for promotion.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university with no NBFC intermediary.
consider: If brand recognition at top hospital chains matters, DPU (Rs 1,89,400, NAAC A++, NIRF #41) or Sharda (Rs 1,54,500) carry more weight.
If you want a similarly priced alternative, NIU Healthcare (Rs 97,600) is another sub-Rs 1 lakh option.
If you want healthcare management with Pune/Maharashtra hospital network access, DPU is the strongest fit despite the higher cost.
